title: Monitoring: NetFlow Exporter (10.10.1.110), IP SLA HTTP GET (300s), SPAN Session 7
guidelines: Refer to the Tasks tab to view the tasks for this lab item.
Refer to the Topology tab to access the device console(s) and perform the tasks.
Console access is available for all required devices.
All necessary preconfigurations have been applied.
Do not change the enable password or hostname for any device.
Save your configurations to NVRAM before moving to the next item.
tasks: Complete the Flexible NetFlow Flow Exporter configuration on R1 to send data to the collector located at 10.10.1.110.
Configure a basic IP SLA HTTP GET operation on R1 to monitor the server at 10.10.1.100 every 300 seconds.
Configure the switch port analyzer on Sw1 using these settings: Session number 7 • Mirror all traffic on E0/0 • Direct the output to interface E1/1.

required.line: ip sla schedule 10 life forever start-time now
monitor session 7 source interface Ethernet0/0 both

hints: R1'de 'show flow exporter' ile exporter adının Export-NetFlowENCOR olup olmadığını doğrula; farklıysa ön-config'teki gerçek adı kullan.
R1'de 'show run | sec sla' ile SLA ID'nin 10 olup olmadığını doğrula; farklıysa gerçek ID'yi kullan.
answer_key_raw:
R1:
R1> enable
R1# configure terminal
R1(config)# flow exporter Export-NetFlowENCOR
R1(config-flow-exporter)# destination 10.10.1.110
R1(config-flow-exporter)# exit
R1(config)# ip sla 10
R1(config-ip-sla)# http get http://10.10.1.100
R1(config-ip-sla-http)# frequency 300
R1(config-ip-sla-http)# exit
R1(config)# ip sla schedule 10 life forever start-time now
R1(config)# end
R1# write

Sw1:
Sw1> enable
Sw1# configure terminal
Sw1(config)# monitor session 7 source interface e0/0 both
Sw1(config)# monitor session 7 destination interface e1/1
Sw1(config)# end
Sw1# write
explanation: Exporter'da collector IP'si 'destination' ile tanımlanır (UDP portu bu item'da ön-config'te hazır). IP SLA HTTP GET operasyonu 'http get <url>' + 'frequency 300' ile kurulur ve 'ip sla schedule' ile başlatılır. SPAN'de tüm E0/0 trafiği (both) session 7 ile E1/1'e yönlendirilir.
